assertions.text: Each angle includes a Pitch Line that is one sentence and ready to use in a pitch email
Every angle includes a concrete reporting approach beyond 'interview experts'
At least one angle is counterintuitive or challenges the conventional framing of the topic
Each angle is marked as either time-sensitive or evergreen
Every headline has a matching subheadline (dek) that adds reporting context
Headlines span at least 4 different structural formats
At least one headline option is under 6 words
Headlines are organized into clusters by register (e.g., Direct/News, Analytical/Literary, Provocative/Punchy)
